displayName: Basic Item Report (by location and/or call number)
description: A basic list of items ordered by library, location, and call number. Filterable by location and/or call number.
instructions: Plug in a shelving location and/or call number. You can also leave things blank to return all items.

parameters.name: shelving_location
parameters.displayName: Shelving Location (Note: You can use a wildcard search if you don't want to spell out the full name (ex. Alphin Main% for Alphin Main Room))

parameters.name: call_no
parameters.displayName: Call Number (Note: Please use a regex search (ex. ^mp for call numbers beginning with MP, case-insensitive))
